sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n4241" key="a)li/pantos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀλίπαντος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n4241.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without grease</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:4:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
